Duplicate accounts found
Google Calendar
Connect your own calendar — tasks assigned to you sync automatically and stay connected until you disconnect
White-Label Branding
Everything here drives the name, logo, and colors shown across the whole Hub — for reselling to a different company or industry
none
Portfolio Tier Names
Rename the three client tiers to match a different reseller's business model — this only changes what's displayed, not how clients are grouped
Authorize a Teammate
This email will be able to sign in with Google, or by creating a password
This app is invite-only — only emails added here can sign in. Once added, tell them to go to the Hub and either click Sign in with Google (if that email is a Google account), or use "First time here? Create your password" under Email/Password to set one up.
Roles Explained
Admin Full access — upload, edit clients, manage the product catalog, and manage the team.
Super user Can upload spreadsheets, connect Sheets, and edit/merge clients. Cannot manage team or the product catalog.
User View-only — dashboards, charts, and reports, no editing or uploads.
Team Members
0 people
Duplicate Clients
Same client name appearing more than once within the same portfolio — usually from a spreadsheet re-uploaded without de-duplicating against existing clients
Click "Scan for Duplicates" to check.

Remove Client

Are you sure?

Connect Google Sheets

Publish your sheet to the web as CSV, then paste that link below. The hub will fetch live data and rebuild every chart, KPI, and table automatically.

How to get the link:
1. In Google Sheets: File → Share → Publish to web
2. Select the SMBs sheet/tab specifically (not "Entire Document")
3. Choose format: Comma-separated values (.csv)
4. Click Publish → copy the generated link
5. Paste it above and click Connect
Required columns: Business Name, Yelp, Google LSA, Voice Agent, Thumbtack, Chat Widget, Contact Form, Acculynx, Builder Prime, Go High Level, Housecall Pro  (use YES/NO or TRUE/FALSE)
